primary_sources.title: DAP registration 18 March 1966, successor in spirit to PAP-Malaysia post-Singapore separation 1965
Loh, F.K.W. Old vs New Politics in Malaysia (Strategic Information & Research Development Centre, 2009)

notes: Founded 18 March 1966, emerging from the post-1965 separation of Singapore (PAP's Malaysian remnants reorganised). Largest non-Malay party. Major partner Pakatan Rakyat (2008-2015) and Pakatan Harapan (2015-). GE14 inflection point; held 42 federal seats post-2018. Wiped out in Sabah Nov 2025 (T4A issue 1701).
